---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
install.packages("haven")
library(haven)
```
```{r}
glimpse(P30_ONLY_Hawaii_Data)
head(P30_ONLY_Hawaii_Data)
tail(P30_ONLY_Hawaii_Data)

P30_Clean <- as_factor(P30_ONLY_Hawaii_Data)
glimpse(P30_Clean)

```
